request: Review the contract I uploaded. If there are red flags, do not send it without my approval.

openclaw_decision.reason: Contract review is legal/high-impact. Analysis is allowed; sending requires owner approval.

rag_lessons.text: Request: Review the contract I uploaded. If there are red flags, do not send it without my approval. Decision: read and analyze the file, extract red flags, prepare a report, and block external send until owner approval.
rag_lessons.lesson: The executor receives an analysis plan, not permission to send or commit the legal action.

synapse_updates.name: tool_restraint
synapse_updates.reason: The request touches external commitment or approval boundaries.

synapse_updates.name: hidden_pressure_reading
synapse_updates.reason: The text carries hesitation, constraint, or latent risk.

synapse_updates.name: template_resistance
synapse_updates.reason: Candidate language resembles recent or banned scaffolds.

style_contract.candidate_summary: I can review it and send it right away if it looks fine.

publication_gate.reason: Candidate is too template-like; silence or regenerate from evidence.

cost_model.claim: Repeated judgment is converted into local cognition instead of re-renting cloud reasoning.

meaning_trace.interpretation: The request contains execution pressure and should be converted into an approval-aware plan.
